jobs.name: ARM Pre-Market Snapshot
jobs.message: ARM pre-market snapshot. web_search "ARM Holdings ARMH stock pre-market today". Extract pre-market price, % change vs prev close, one headline if notable. write_file /lfs/memory/arm_stock_today.md (overwrite, under 100 words). No email/Telegram — this feeds the 06:20 morning briefing.

jobs.name: Morning Briefing
jobs.message: Run the morning-briefing skill: read /lfs/skills/morning-briefing.md and execute all steps. Send the daily briefing email to James. If send_email fails, fall back to telegram_send_message (chat_id 5538967144) with a condensed version.

jobs.name: HA Update Check
jobs.message: Run the ha-updater skill: read /lfs/skills/ha-updater.md and execute all steps. Check for HA Core, OS, and integration updates. Auto-install integration/device firmware updates. For Core/OS updates (manual action required), send an email alert AND a short Telegram summary to chat_id 5538967144. If nothing needs attention, send a brief Telegram 'all current' line.

jobs.name: Saturday Surf Check
jobs.message: Use the surf-forecast skill to check surf conditions at Pacifica/Lindamar beach for tomorrow Sunday. Use the noaa_buoy tool first for real buoy data (station 46012), then web_search for tomorrow's forecast if needed. Give a clear GO/MAYBE/SKIP verdict. Send James a Telegram message with the full surf report.

jobs.name: Monday Wirecutter Deals
jobs.message: Use the wirecutter_deals skill: search Wirecutter for current top deals on consumer electronics, computing, audio/video, and smart home. Filter for items under $500. Send James an email summary of the top 5-7 deals with links.

jobs.name: Friday Weekend Planner
jobs.message: Use the weekend-planner skill: compile a weekend-at-a-glance digest for James. Check surf forecast for Saturday and Sunday at Pacifica/Lindamar (go/no-go verdict for each day), SF weather for the weekend, any upcoming tech events within 14 days, and France trip countdown if within 60 days. Send via Telegram.

jobs.name: Sunday ARM Ecosystem News
jobs.message: Use the arm-news skill: run the weekly ARM ecosystem news scan. Fetch Arm newsroom RSS, then search for Qualcomm Snapdragon PC/Chromebook news, MediaTek Dimensity/Kompanio news, and Windows on Arm/Copilot+ PC updates from the past week. Filter for relevance to Arm's PC and Chromebook business. Send a concise digest to James via Telegram (5-8 bullets max, 4 web_search calls max).

jobs.name: France Trip Prep Reminder
jobs.message: Travel prep reminder: France trip is in 7 days (June 14). Tasks: cancel SF Chronicle newspapers, suspend USPS mail at usps.com/manage/hold-mail.htm, notify bank/credit card of travel to France, check passport expiry (must be valid past Dec 2026). Send James a Telegram message with the full checklist from the travel-prep skill.

jobs.name: Weekly Memory Compaction
jobs.message: Run the memory-compactor skill: read MEMORY.md, remove duplicate or superseded entries, merge related facts, keep total size under 8KB. Write the compacted result back to MEMORY.md. Log a one-line summary of what was removed.
